creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
TL;DR; https://reviews.freebsd.org/D13869

For CentOS 6 the nss rpm contained nss-pam, however for CentOS 7 it was split out into a separate rpm.  Add it to the port for consistency.  

Upstream patched the nss security vulnerability a few rpm versions ago, teach vuxml about this.
